Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action (Minor)
Off Calendar Aug-18-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 318. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Proceedings Not Reported.

Jannik Catalano, Esq. appeared with petitioner Kathy Perez, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Natalie Perez, who was not present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $17,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $4,250.00.
Medical Costs - $2,641.87.
Costs - $149.15.

The net balance of $9,958.98 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank located at 2300 16th Street, San Francisco, CA 94103. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Counsel shall prepare the Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor and submit same to the Court for review and signature. Order to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to September 28, 2015 9:00 a.m. in Department 318 for Progress Report re: Receipt & Acknowledgment of Money Into a Blocked Account.

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action (Minor)
